mapper.insert:
insert into his_inpatient_charge_mirror ( id, tenant_id, fetch_batch_id, his_inpatient_charge_id, his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, patient_id, patient_name, inpatient_no, dept_code, dept_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, charge_item_id, item_name, spec_model, batch_no, expire_date, use_date, charge_date, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, charge_operator, remark, row_fingerprint, process_status, create_by, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.fetchBatchId}, #{e.hisInpatientChargeId}, #{e.hisInpatientChargeIdTf}, #{e.patientId}, #{e.patientName}, #{e.inpatientNo}, #{e.deptCode}, #{e.deptName}, #{e.doctorId}, #{e.doctorName}, #{e.chargeItemId}, #{e.itemName}, #{e.specModel}, #{e.batchNo}, #{e.expireDate}, #{e.useDate}, #{e.chargeDate}, #{e.quantity}, #{e.unitPrice}, #{e.totalAmount}, #{e.chargeOperator}, #{e.remark}, #{e.rowFingerprint}, #{e.processStatus}, #{e.createBy}, #{e.createTime})
mapper.select: select 'INPATIENT' as visitType, patient_name as patientName, inpatient_no as visitNo, ifnull(dept_name,'') as deptName, count(*) as lineCount, ifnull(sum(total_amount),0) as sumAmount from his_inpatient_charge_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and date(charge_date) >= date(#{beginChargeDate}) and date(charge_date) <= date(#{endChargeDate}) group by patient_name, inpatient_no, ifnull(dept_name,'') order by sumAmount desc

select m.*, cim.value_level as value_level from his_inpatient_charge_mirror m left join his_charge_item_mirror cim on cim.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and trim(cim.charge_item_id) = trim(m.charge_item_id) and (cim.deleted_flag is null or cim.deleted_flag = 0) where m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and m.fetch_batch_id = #{fetchBatchId} and m.process_status = 'PENDING_CONSUME' and (m.his_inpatient_charge_id_tf is null or trim(m.his_inpatient_charge_id_tf) = '') order by m.charge_date asc, m.id asc

select m.*, cim.value_level as value_level from his_inpatient_charge_mirror m left join his_charge_item_mirror cim on cim.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and trim(cim.charge_item_id) = trim(m.charge_item_id) and (cim.deleted_flag is null or cim.deleted_flag = 0) where m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and m.fetch_batch_id = #{fetchBatchId} and m.process_status = 'PENDING_CONSUME' and trim(ifnull(m.his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, '')) != '' order by m.charge_date asc, m.id asc
mapper.update: update his_inpatient_charge_mirror set process_status = #{processStatus}, process_type = #{processType}, process_time = #{processTime}, process_by = #{processBy}, process_situation = #{processSituation}, process_party = #{processParty}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id in #{rid}

update his_inpatient_charge_mirror set process_situation = #{processSituation}, process_party = #{processParty}, process_time = #{processTime}, process_by = #{processBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id in #{rid}
mapper.select: select * from his_inpatient_charge_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} limit 1

select m.*, cim.value_level as value_level from his_inpatient_charge_mirror m left join his_charge_item_mirror cim on cim.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and trim(cim.charge_item_id) = trim(m.charge_item_id) and (cim.deleted_flag is null or cim.deleted_flag = 0) where m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and trim(ifnull(m.his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, '')) = trim(#{chargeIdTf}) and m.process_status in ('CONSUMED', 'REFUNDED') order by m.charge_date asc, m.id asc
